title: AgentProgress
description: Heartbeat and progress reporting from a running agent. Written to .plan-execution/progress/{taskId}.json

taskId.description: Unique task identifier matching the WaveTask.taskId in state.json

phase.description: Current execution phase within the agent's lifecycle

percentComplete.description: Best-effort progress estimate. Must be monotonically non-decreasing.

filesWritten.description: Files created or modified so far

issuesSoFar.description: Count of issues encountered during execution

heartbeatAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of this update. The orchestrator compares this against wall clock to detect hangs.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent began execution

checkpointCount.description: Monotonically increasing counter. Proves progress even if timestamps are unreliable.
